name: Artificial Intelligence for Understanding and Managing Transportation Behavior in Sustainable Smart Cities

description: arXiv:2607.17694v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Urban transportation systems generate heterogeneous data, yet these data do not automatically become actionable management intelligence. This chapter adopts a behavior-centered perspective on artificial intelligence (AI), treating mobility records and passenger-generated text as behavioral evidence rather than behavioral truth. It examines four di...
author: Junbiao Pang, Muhammad Ayub Sabir, Fatima Ashraf
